name: Tool Calls Allowlisted
description: Every tool/capability invocation must lie within the certified allowlist for the agent's tier.
rationale: Szpruch capability control: a tool call outside all approved lists is a Red halt. Tier 2 governance enforces the allowlist as policy-as-code, not prompt guidance.

examples.fails: ToolCall to a capability outside the certified allowlist

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
